member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqCompiledRegEx.TypeTagsRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
(,?\\s*Version\\s*=\\s*[\\d.]+)|(,?\\s*Culture\\s*=\\s*[^,]+)|(,?\\s*PublicKeyToken\\s*=\\s*[^,\\]]+)
Explanation:
○ Match with 3 alternative expressions, atomically.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match ',' atomically, optionally.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match the string "Version".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match '='.
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ Match a character in the set [.\d] atomically at least once.
○ 2nd capture group.
○ Match ',' atomically, optionally.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match the string "Culture".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match '='.
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ Match a character other than ',' atomically at least once.
○ 3rd capture group.
○ Match ',' atomically, optionally.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match the string "PublicKeyToken".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match '='.
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ Match a character in the set [^,]] atomically at least once.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqCompiledRegEx.TypeCleanupRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
\\s*,\\s*
Explanation:
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match ','.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqConsumeResult
member.summary: Result of subscriber receiving a message from a server queue.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqConsumeResult.Disposition
member.summary: Denotes if and how the message is marked as delivered.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqConsumeResult.DeferDuration
member.summary: When the consumption disposition is deferred, this is the amount of time to delay the redelivery of the message.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqConsumeResult.#ctor(NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqConsumptionDisposition)
member.summary: Represents the result of a message consumption operation, including its disposition.
member.param: The disposition of the consumed message, indicating the outcome of the consumption process.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqConsumeResult.Consumed
member.summary: Shortcut function that returns a CMqConsumeResult with the Consumed disposition.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqConsumeResult.NotConsumed
member.summary: Shortcut function that returns a CMqConsumeResult with the NotConsumed disposition.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqConsumeResult.NotInterested
member.summary: Shortcut function that returns a CMqConsumeResult with the NotConsumed disposition.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqConsumeResult.DeadLetter
member.summary: Shortcut function that returns a CMqConsumeResult with the DeadLetter disposition.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqConsumeResult.Drop
member.summary: Shortcut function that returns a CMqConsumeResult with the Drop disposition.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqConsumeResult.Defer(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Shortcut function that returns a CMqConsumeResult with the Defer disposition.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqDeadLetterQueueConfiguration
member.summary: Defines a dead-letter queue configuration.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqDeadLetterQueueConfiguration.DeliveryThrottle
member.summary: The amount of time to wait between sending individual messages to subscribers.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqDeadLetterQueueConfiguration.MaxDeliveryAttempts
member.summary: The maximum number of times the server will attempt to deliver any message to a subscriber before giving up. 0 = infinite.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqDeadLetterQueueConfiguration.MaxMessageAge
member.summary: The maximum time that a message item can remain in the queue without being delivered before being removed. 0 = infinite.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqDeadLetterQueueConfiguration.ConsumptionScheme
member.summary: Determines when to remove messages from the queue as they are distributed to subscribers.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqDeadLetterQueueConfiguration.DeliveryScheme
member.summary: Determines how messages are distributed to subscribers.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqDeadLetterQueueConfiguration.PersistenceScheme
member.summary: Whether the queue is persisted or ephemeral.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqDeadLetterQueueConfiguration.#ctor
member.summary: Instantiates a new instance of CMqQueueConfiguration.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqDeadLetterQueueConfiguration.ToConfiguration(System.String)
member.summary: Converts the current queue settings into a instance configured as a dead-letter queue.
member.remarks: The generated dead-letter queue configuration uses the parent queue name to derive its name by appending ".dlq". The configuration is tailored for handling undeliverable messages, with properties such as set to .
member.param: The name of the parent queue. This value is used to generate the name of the dead-letter queue.
member.returns: A instance representing the dead-letter queue configuration. The returned configuration includes properties such as , , and .

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqDefaults
member.summary: Provides default configuration values for a message queue system.
member.remarks: This class contains constants that define default settings for various aspects of the message queue system, such as buffer sizes, timeout durations, and delivery thread behavior. These values are intended to be used as sensible defaults but can be overridden in specific implementations if needed.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqDefaults.QUEUE_THREAD_DELIVERY_BURNDOWN
member.summary: the number of delivery cycle attempts to perform before yielding a queues delivery thread.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqDefaults.DEFAULT_PERSISTENT_MESSAGES_BUFFER_SIZE
member.summary: The number of messages to load from a persistence database when hydrating the message buffer.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqDefaults.DEFAULT_PERSISTENT_MESSAGES_MIN_BUFFER
member.summary: The minimum number of messages to keep in memory for persistent queues.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqDefaults.DEFAULT_DEADLOCK_AVOIDANCE_WAIT_MS
member.summary: The amount of time to wait when performing deadlock avoidance locks.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqDefaults.DEFAULT_TRY_WAIT_MS
member.summary: The amount of time to wait when attempting to acquire a lock.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqDefaults.DEFAULT_INITIAL_BUFFER_SIZE
member.summary: The initial size in bytes of the buffer. If the buffer ever gets full while receiving data it will be automatically resized by a factor of BUFFER_GROWTH_RATE up to MAX_BUFFER_SIZE.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqDefaults.DEFAULT_MAX_BUFFER_SIZE
member.summary: The maximum size in bytes of the buffer. If the buffer ever gets full while receiving data it will be automatically resized by a factor of BUFFER_GROWTH_RATE up to MAX_BUFFER_SIZE.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqDefaults.DEFAULT_BUFFER_GROWTH_RATE
member.summary: The growth rate for auto-resizing the buffer. Expressed in decimal percentages.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqDefaults.DEFAULT_ACK_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
member.summary: The default amount of time to wait for a query to reply before throwing a timeout exception.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqDefaults.DEFAULT_LISTEN_PORT
member.summary: The port which the queue service will listen on.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqDefaults.DEFAULT_AUTO_RECONNECT
member.summary: Whether or not the client should attempt to reconnect when unexpectedly disconnected.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqDefaults.DEFAULT_ENABLE_HISTORICAL_STATISTICS
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether historical statistics are enabled for data collection or analysis.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqDefaults.DEFAULT_MAX_HISTORICAL_STATISTICS_DATAPOINTS
member.summary: The number historical datapoints to retain per queue.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqQueueConfiguration
member.summary: Defines a queue configuration.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqQueueConfiguration.QueueName
member.summary: The name of the queue.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqQueueConfiguration.AsycnronousDelivery
member.summary: Whether messages are delivered to subscribers asynchronously. Messages are still delivered in order per subscriber, but multiple messages can be in-flight to different subscribers at the same time.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqQueueConfiguration.MaxOutstandingDeliveries
member.summary: The maximum number of simultaneously outstanding asynchronous deliveries.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqQueueConfiguration.DeliveryThrottle
member.summary: The amount of time to wait between sending individual messages to subscribers.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqQueueConfiguration.IsDeadLetter
member.summary: Denotes whether this is a dead-letter queue.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqQueueConfiguration.MaxDeliveryAttempts
member.summary: The maximum number of times the server will attempt to deliver any message to a subscriber before giving up, this includes deferred deliveries. 0 = infinite.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqQueueConfiguration.MaxMessageAge
member.summary: The maximum time that a message item can remain in the queue without being delivered before being removed. 0 = infinite.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqQueueConfiguration.ConsumptionScheme
member.summary: Determines when to remove messages from the queue as they are distributed to subscribers.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqQueueConfiguration.DeliveryScheme
member.summary: Determines how messages are distributed to subscribers.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqQueueConfiguration.PersistenceScheme
member.summary: Whether the queue is persisted or ephemeral.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqQueueConfiguration.DeadLetterConfiguration
member.summary: Optional configuration for companion queue which contains expired messages or failed deliveries.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqQueueConfiguration.#ctor
member.summary: Instantiates a new instance of CMqQueueConfiguration.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqQueueConfiguration.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Instantiates a new instance of CMqQueueConfiguration.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqReceivedMessage
member.summary: A message received by the server.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqReceivedMessage.#ctor(System.String,System.UInt64,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: A message received by the server.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqReceivedMessage.SerializationProvider
member.summary: Provides access to the custom serialization provider, if configured.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqReceivedMessage.QueueName
member.summary: The name of the queue which this message came from.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqReceivedMessage.AssemblyQualifiedTypeName
member.summary: The assembly qualified type name of the object stored in MessageJson.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqReceivedMessage.MessageJson
member.summary: Json serialized object of type denoted by ObjectType.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqReceivedMessage.SerialNumber
member.summary: The unique ID of the message per queue.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqReceivedMessage.Timestamp
member.summary: The UTC date and time when the message was enqueued.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqReceivedMessage.DeferredCount
member.summary: The number of times this message has been delivered and the subscriber requested that delivery be deferred.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqReceivedMessage.DeferDuration
member.summary: The amount of time to wait before delivering this message.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqReceivedMessage.SubscriberDeliveryCount
member.summary: The number of subscribers that this message has been successfully delivered to.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqReceivedMessage.SatisfiedSubscriberCount
member.summary: The number of subscribers that have responded to the delivery of this message.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqReceivedMessage.FailedSubscriberCount
member.summary: The number of subscribers deliveries that have failed.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqReceivedMessage.Deserialize
member.summary: Deserializes the received message to its original type.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqReceivedMessage.Deserialize``1
member.summary: Deserializes the received message to its original type, casted to the given type.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqSerialization
member.summary: Provides methods for serializing and deserializing objects to and from JSON, as well as utilities for working with assembly-qualified type names.
member.remarks: This class includes functionality for deserializing JSON into objects of specific types, either directly or using a custom serialization provider. It also provides methods for retrieving assembly-qualified type names, which are used to identify types during deserialization.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqSerialization.MqDeserializeToObject``1(System.String,NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.ICMqSerializationProvider)
member.summary: Deserialization function called from MessageDeliveryQuery via reflection.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqSerialization.GetAssemblyQualifiedTypeName(System.Object)
member.summary: Retrieves the assembly-qualified name of the type of the specified object.
member.param: The object whose type's assembly-qualified name is to be retrieved. Cannot be .
member.returns: The assembly-qualified name of the object's type.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqSerialization.GetAssemblyQualifiedTypeName(System.Type)
member.summary: Retrieves the assembly-qualified name of the specified .
member.remarks: This method handles both generic and non-generic types. For generic types, the assembly-qualified name is constructed using the type definition and assembly name. Additional cleanup is applied to remove unnecessary tags and formatting.
member.param: The for which to retrieve the assembly-qualified name. Cannot be .
member.returns: A string representing the assembly-qualified name of the specified type, with additional formatting applied.
member.exception: Thrown if the type's name or assembly information is unavailable, or if the operation fails to generate the assembly-qualified name.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqSerialization.Deserialize(NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqReceivedMessage)
member.summary: Deserializes the received message to its original type.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqSerialization.DeserializeAs``1(System.String,NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.ICMqSerializationProvider)
member.summary: Deserializes JSON to an object of type T using its assembly-qualified name.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqSerialization.DeserializeAs(System.String,System.String,NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.ICMqSerializationProvider)
member.summary: Deserializes JSON to an object of the given type string.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqMessageState
member.summary: Represents the state of a message in the message queue.
member.remarks: This enumeration defines the various states a message can be in during its lifecycle within the message queue. The state indicates whether the message is ready for delivery, actively being delivered, or requires special handling.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqMessageState.Ready
member.summary: Message is ready for delivery.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqMessageState.OutForDelivery
member.summary: Message is currently being delivered to subscribers.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqMessageState.DeadLetter
member.summary: Message should be dead lettered.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqMessageState.Drop
member.summary: Message should be dropped.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqMessageState.Shutdown
member.summary: The message queue was shutting down and delivery was aborted.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqConsumptionDisposition
member.summary: Represents the possible dispositions for a message after being processed by a subscriber.
member.remarks: This enumeration defines how a subscriber can indicate the outcome of processing a message. The disposition affects whether the message is re-delivered, deferred, or removed from the queue.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqConsumptionDisposition.NotInterested
member.summary: The message was not consumed by the subscriber and delivery will not be re-attempted to this subscriber.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqConsumptionDisposition.NotConsumed
member.summary: The message was not consumed by the subscriber and delivery will be re-attempted to this subscriber.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqConsumptionDisposition.Consumed
member.summary: The message was consumed by the subscriber.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqConsumptionDisposition.Defer
member.summary: Subscriber requesting that the message be delivered at a later time.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqConsumptionDisposition.DeadLetter
member.summary: Subscriber requesting that the message be immediately sent to the dead-letter queue, if any. Otherwise the message is dropped. Note that the dead-letter queue expiration times are also respected.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqConsumptionDisposition.Drop
member.summary: Subscriber requesting that the message be immediately dropped from the queue and cache.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqConsumptionDisposition.Exception
member.summary: An exception occurred while delivering or processing the message.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqConsumptionScheme
member.summary: Determines when to remove messages from the queue as they are distributed to subscribers.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqConsumptionScheme.AllSubscribersSatisfied
member.summary: The messages are delivered to each subscriber, the message is removed once it is delivered to all subscribers and they have consumed or explicitly rejected it.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqConsumptionScheme.FirstConsumedSubscriber
member.summary: The messages are delivered to subscribers, but is removed and delivery is stopped when any one of the subscribers consumes the message.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqDeliveryScheme
member.summary: Determines how messages are distributed to subscribers.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqDeliveryScheme.Balanced
member.summary: Messages are delivered to the subscribers based on the attempted delivery count to each subscriber.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqDeliveryScheme.Random
member.summary: Messages are delivered to subscribers in a random order.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqPersistenceScheme
member.summary: Whether the queue is persisted or ephemeral.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqPersistenceScheme.Ephemeral
member.summary: Undelivered messages are lost when the the service stops.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqPersistenceScheme.Persistent
member.summary: Messages are stored on disk and survive service restarts.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqErrorLevel
member.summary: Used for message and error logging.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqErrorLevel.Verbose
member.summary: Use for detailed diagnostic information.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqErrorLevel.Debug
member.summary: Use for debugging information.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqErrorLevel.Information
member.summary: Use for general informational messages.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqErrorLevel.Warning
member.summary: Use for potentially harmful situations.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqErrorLevel.Error
member.summary: Use for errors that prevent the execution of a specific part of the application.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqErrorLevel.Fatal
member.summary: Use for critical errors that cause the application to crash or terminate.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.ICMqMessage
member.summary: Any message that is dispatched should inherit from IMqMessage.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.ICMqSerializationProvider
member.summary: Use to provide custom payload serialization.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.ICMqSerializationProvider.SerializeToText``1(``0)
member.summary: Serialize the frame payload to text before it is compressed, encrypted and sent.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.ICMqSerializationProvider.DeserializeToObject``1(System.String)
member.summary: Deserialize the frame payload text to an object after it is received, decrypted and decompressed.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqCreateQueueQuery
member.summary: Represents a query for creating a message queue with the specified configuration.
member.remarks: This query is used to define the configuration of a message queue to be created. The configuration is specified using the object.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqCreateQueueQuery.#ctor(NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqQueueConfiguration)
member.summary: Represents a query for creating a message queue with the specified configuration.
member.remarks: This query is used to define the configuration of a message queue to be created. The configuration is specified using the object.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqCreateQueueQuery.QueueConfiguration
member.summary: Gets or sets the configuration settings for the message queue.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqCreateQueueQueryReply
member.summary: Represents the reply to a queue creation query, indicating success or failure.
member.remarks: This class provides information about the outcome of a queue creation operation, including whether the operation succeeded and, if applicable, an error message describing the failure.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqCreateQueueQueryReply.IsSuccess
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the operation was successful.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqCreateQueueQueryReply.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets the error message associated with the current operation.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqCreateQueueQueryReply.#ctor(System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class, representing a failed queue creation operation.
member.remarks: This constructor sets the property to and populates the property with the message from the provided .
member.param: The exception that caused the failure. Cannot be .

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqCreateQueueQueryReply.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A value indicating whether the queue creation query was successful. if the query succeeded; otherwise, .

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqCreateQueueQueryReply.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.remarks: This constructor creates an instance of the class. Use this class to represent the reply to a queue creation query in the messaging system.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqCreateQueueQueryReply.ThrowIfFailed
member.summary: Throws an exception if the current operation did not succeed.
member.remarks: Use this method to enforce that the operation completed successfully. If the operation failed, an exception is thrown to indicate the error condition.
member.exception: Thrown if the operation has failed. The exception message contains the associated error message.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqDeleteQueueQuery
member.summary: Represents a query to delete a message queue.
member.remarks: This query is used to request the deletion of a specific message queue identified by its name. Ensure that the queue name provided exists and is valid within the context of the system.
member.param: The name of the message queue to be deleted. Cannot be null or empty.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqDeleteQueueQuery.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Represents a query to delete a message queue.
member.remarks: This query is used to request the deletion of a specific message queue identified by its name. Ensure that the queue name provided exists and is valid within the context of the system.
member.param: The name of the message queue to be deleted. Cannot be null or empty.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqDeleteQueueQuery.QueueName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the queue.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqDeleteQueueQueryReply
member.summary: Represents the reply to a delete queue operation, providing information about the success or failure of the operation.
member.remarks: This class encapsulates the result of a delete queue operation, including whether the operation succeeded and any associated error message. Instances of this class can be initialized with success status or an exception to provide detailed error information.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqDeleteQueueQueryReply.IsSuccess
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the operation was successful.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqDeleteQueueQueryReply.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets the error message associated with the current operation.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqDeleteQueueQueryReply.#ctor(System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class, representing a failed queue deletion operation.
member.remarks: This constructor sets the property to and populates the property with the message from the provided exception.
member.param: The exception that caused the operation to fail. Cannot be .

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqDeleteQueueQueryReply.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Represents the reply to a delete queue query operation.
member.param: A value indicating whether the delete queue operation was successful. if the operation succeeded; otherwise, .

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqDeleteQueueQueryReply.#ctor
member.summary: Represents the reply to a query for deleting a message queue.
member.remarks: This class is used to encapsulate the response details when a delete queue query is executed. It does not perform any operations itself but serves as a container for the query reply.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqDeleteQueueQueryReply.ThrowIfFailed
member.summary: Throws an exception if the current operation did not succeed.
member.remarks: Use this method to enforce that the operation completed successfully. If the operation failed, an exception is thrown to indicate the error condition.
member.exception: Thrown if the operation has failed. The exception message contains the associated error message.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqEnqueueMessageToQueue
member.summary: Represents a request to enqueue a message into a specified queue, with optional deferred delivery and type metadata.
member.remarks: This class is used to encapsulate the details of a message being enqueued into a queue, including the queue name, optional delivery delay, the type of the message object, and the serialized message content.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqEnqueueMessageToQueue.#ctor(System.String,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Represents a request to enqueue a message into a specified queue, with optional deferred delivery and type metadata.
member.remarks: This class is used to encapsulate the details of a message being enqueued into a queue, including the queue name, optional delivery delay, the type of the message object, and the serialized message content.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqEnqueueMessageToQueue.QueueName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the queue.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqEnqueueMessageToQueue.DeferDeliveryDuration
member.summary: The amount of time, when if set, in which the server will delay delivery of the message.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqEnqueueMessageToQueue.ObjectType
member.summary: The full assembly qualified name of the type of MessageJson.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqEnqueueMessageToQueue.MessageJson
member.summary: Gets or sets the JSON representation of the message.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqEnqueueMessageToQueueReply
member.summary: Represents the reply to an enqueue message operation in a message queue.
member.remarks: This class provides information about the result of an enqueue operation, including whether the operation was successful and any associated error message. It can be used to inspect the outcome of the operation and handle errors accordingly.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqEnqueueMessageToQueueReply.IsSuccess
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the operation was successful.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqEnqueueMessageToQueueReply.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets the error message associated with the current operation.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqEnqueueMessageToQueueReply.#ctor(System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class, representing a failed enqueue operation with the specified exception details.
member.param: The exception that caused the enqueue operation to fail. The property will be populated with the exception's message.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqEnqueueMessageToQueueReply.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Represents the reply received after attempting to enqueue a message to a queue.
member.param: A value indicating whether the enqueue operation was successful. if the operation succeeded; otherwise, .

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqEnqueueMessageToQueueReply.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.remarks: This constructor creates an instance of the class. Use this class to represent the reply or response after a message is enqueued to a queue.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqEnqueueMessageToQueueReply.ThrowIfFailed
member.summary: Throws an exception if the current operation did not succeed.
member.remarks: Use this method to enforce that the operation completed successfully. If the operation failed, an exception is thrown to indicate the error condition.
member.exception: Thrown if the operation has failed. The exception message contains the associated error message.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqPurgeQueueQuery
member.summary: Represents a query to purge all messages from a specified message queue.
member.remarks: This query is used to remove all messages from the specified queue. It is typically used in scenarios where the queue needs to be cleared before processing new messages or when the existing messages are no longer needed.
member.param: The name of the queue to be purged. Cannot be null or empty.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqPurgeQueueQuery.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Represents a query to purge all messages from a specified message queue.
member.remarks: This query is used to remove all messages from the specified queue. It is typically used in scenarios where the queue needs to be cleared before processing new messages or when the existing messages are no longer needed.
member.param: The name of the queue to be purged. Cannot be null or empty.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqPurgeQueueQuery.QueueName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the queue.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqPurgeQueueQueryReply
member.summary: Represents the reply to a purge queue query operation, providing information about the success or failure of the operation.
member.remarks: This class encapsulates the result of a purge queue query operation, including whether the operation succeeded and any associated error message. Instances of this class can be initialized with specific success states or exception details.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqPurgeQueueQueryReply.IsSuccess
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the operation was successful.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqPurgeQueueQueryReply.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets the error message associated with the current operation.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqPurgeQueueQueryReply.#ctor(System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class, representing a failed operation.
member.remarks: This constructor sets the property to and populates the property with the message from the provided .
member.param: The exception that caused the operation to fail. Cannot be .

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqPurgeQueueQueryReply.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Represents the reply to a purge queue query operation.
member.param: A value indicating whether the purge queue query operation was successful.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqPurgeQueueQueryReply.#ctor
member.summary: Represents a reply to a purge queue query in the messaging system.
member.remarks: This class is used to encapsulate the response data for a query that purges a queue. It provides a structured way to handle the reply from the messaging system.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqPurgeQueueQueryReply.ThrowIfFailed
member.summary: Throws an exception if the current operation did not succeed.
member.remarks: Use this method to enforce that the operation completed successfully. If the operation failed, an exception is thrown to indicate the error condition.
member.exception: Thrown if the operation has failed. The exception message contains the associated error message.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqSubscribeToQueueQuery
member.summary: Represents a query to subscribe to a message queue for processing.
member.remarks: This query is used to initiate a subscription to a specific message queue. The subscription allows the caller to process messages from the specified queue.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqSubscribeToQueueQuery.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Represents a query to subscribe to a message queue for processing.
member.remarks: This query is used to initiate a subscription to a specific message queue. The subscription allows the caller to process messages from the specified queue.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqSubscribeToQueueQuery.QueueName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the queue used for message processing.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqSubscribeToQueueQueryReply.IsSuccess
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the operation was successful.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqSubscribeToQueueQueryReply.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets the error message associated with the current operation.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqSubscribeToQueueQueryReply.#ctor(System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class, representing a failed subscription attempt to a message queue.
member.param: The exception that caused the subscription attempt to fail. The exception's message is used to populate the property.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqSubscribeToQueueQueryReply.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A value indicating whether the subscription to the queue query was successful. if the subscription succeeded; otherwise, .

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqSubscribeToQueueQueryReply.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.remarks: This constructor creates an instance of the class. Use this class to handle replies for queue subscription queries in a message queue system.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqSubscribeToQueueQueryReply.ThrowIfFailed
member.summary: Throws an exception if the current operation did not succeed.
member.remarks: Use this method to enforce that the operation completed successfully. If the operation failed, an exception is thrown to indicate the error condition.
member.exception: Thrown if the operation has failed. The exception message contains the associated error message.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqUnsubscribeFromQueueQuery
member.summary: Represents a query to unsubscribe from a message queue.
member.remarks: This query is used to request the removal of a subscription to a specific message queue. The property specifies the name of the queue to unsubscribe from.
member.param: The name of the message queue to unsubscribe from. Cannot be null or empty.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqUnsubscribeFromQueueQuery.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Represents a query to unsubscribe from a message queue.
member.remarks: This query is used to request the removal of a subscription to a specific message queue. The property specifies the name of the queue to unsubscribe from.
member.param: The name of the message queue to unsubscribe from. Cannot be null or empty.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqUnsubscribeFromQueueQuery.QueueName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the queue.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqUnsubscribeFromQueueQueryReply
member.summary: Represents the reply to an unsubscribe operation from a message queue.
member.remarks: This class encapsulates the result of an attempt to unsubscribe from a message queue, including whether the operation was successful and any associated error message.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqUnsubscribeFromQueueQueryReply.IsSuccess
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the operation was successful.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqUnsubscribeFromQueueQueryReply.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets the error message associated with the current operation.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqUnsubscribeFromQueueQueryReply.#ctor(System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class, representing a failed attempt to unsubscribe from a queue.
member.remarks: This constructor sets the property to and populates the property with the message from the provided exception.
member.param: The exception that occurred during the unsubscribe operation.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqUnsubscribeFromQueueQueryReply.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Represents the reply to a query for unsubscribing from a message queue.
member.param: A value indicating whether the unsubscription operation was successful.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqUnsubscribeFromQueueQueryReply.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.remarks: This constructor creates an instance of the class. Use this class to handle replies for unsubscribe queries in a message queue system.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ClientToServer.CMqUnsubscribeFromQueueQueryReply.ThrowIfFailed
member.summary: Throws an exception if the current operation did not succeed.
member.remarks: Use this method to enforce that the operation completed successfully. If the operation failed, an exception is thrown to indicate the error condition.
member.exception: Thrown if the operation has failed. The exception message contains the associated error message.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ServerToClient.CMqMessageDeliveryQuery
member.summary: Represents a query for delivering a message from a queue, including metadata about the message and its delivery status.
member.remarks: This class encapsulates information about a message being delivered from a queue, such as its unique identifier, serialized content, type information, and delivery statistics. It is used to track the delivery progress and manage deferred delivery requests.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ServerToClient.CMqMessageDeliveryQuery.#ctor(System.String,System.UInt64,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Represents a query for delivering a message from a queue, including metadata about the message and its delivery status.
member.remarks: This class encapsulates information about a message being delivered from a queue, such as its unique identifier, serialized content, type information, and delivery statistics. It is used to track the delivery progress and manage deferred delivery requests.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ServerToClient.CMqMessageDeliveryQuery.QueueName
member.summary: The name of the queue from which this message is being delivered.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ServerToClient.CMqMessageDeliveryQuery.AssemblyQualifiedTypeName
member.summary: The full assembly qualified name of the type of MessageJson.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ServerToClient.CMqMessageDeliveryQuery.MessageJson
member.summary: Json serialized object of type denoted by ObjectType.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ServerToClient.CMqMessageDeliveryQuery.SerialNumber
member.summary: The unique ID of the message per queue.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ServerToClient.CMqMessageDeliveryQuery.Timestamp
member.summary: The UTC date and time when the message was enqueued.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ServerToClient.CMqMessageDeliveryQuery.DeferredCount
member.summary: The number of times this message has been delivered and the subscriber requested that delivery be deferred.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ServerToClient.CMqMessageDeliveryQuery.DeferDuration
member.summary: The amount of time to wait before delivering this message.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ServerToClient.CMqMessageDeliveryQuery.SubscriberDeliveryCount
member.summary: The number of subscribers that this message has been successfully delivered to.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ServerToClient.CMqMessageDeliveryQuery.SatisfiedSubscriberCount
member.summary: The number of subscribers that have responded to the delivery of this message.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ServerToClient.CMqMessageDeliveryQuery.FailedSubscriberCount
member.summary: The number of subscribers deliveries that have failed.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ServerToClient.CMqMessageDeliveryQueryReply
member.summary: Represents the reply to a message delivery query, providing information about the consumption status of the message and any associated error details.
member.remarks: This class is used to encapsulate the result of a message delivery query, including whether the message was consumed by the client and any error messages that occurred during processing. The message remains at the top of the queue until it is consumed by all subscribers, expires, or is dead-lettered.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ServerToClient.CMqMessageDeliveryQueryReply.ConsumeResult
member.summary: Denotes whether the client which received the delivery notification consumed the message. The message will not leave the top of the queue until it has been consumed by all subscribers (or the message expires or is dead-lettered).

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ServerToClient.CMqMessageDeliveryQueryReply.IsSuccess
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the operation was successful.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ServerToClient.CMqMessageDeliveryQueryReply.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets the error message associated with the current operation.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ServerToClient.CMqMessageDeliveryQueryReply.#ctor(System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class, representing a reply to a message delivery query with an error condition.
member.param: The exception that caused the message delivery query to fail. The exception's message is used to populate the property.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ServerToClient.CMqMessageDeliveryQueryReply.#ctor(NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqConsumeResult)
member.summary: Represents a reply to a message delivery query, containing the result of a message consumption operation.
member.param: The result of the message consumption operation. Cannot be null.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ServerToClient.CMqMessageDeliveryQueryReply.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.remarks: This constructor sets the property to a default value indicating that the message has not been consumed.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ServerToClient.CMqMessageDeliveryQueryReply.ThrowIfFailed
member.summary: Throws an exception if the current operation did not succeed.
member.remarks: Use this method to enforce that the operation completed successfully. If the operation failed, an exception is thrown to indicate the error condition.
member.exception: Thrown if the operation has failed. The exception message contains the associated error message.

member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.IndexOfNonAsciiOrAny_C3EFF60EFB90345ACA3E92B6B5687EAB438B5A477C961D95EEA66204D9E64CFB(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Finds the next index of any character that matches a character in the set [,CPV\s\s\s].

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_ascii_FFC1FFFFFEEFFFFFF7FFBEFFFFFFFFFF
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "\0\u0001\u0002\u0003\u0004\u0005\u0006\a\b\u000e\u000f\u0010\u0011\u0012\u0013\u0014\u0015\u0016\u0017\u0018\u0019\u001a\u001b\u001c\u001d\u001e\u001f!\"#$%&'()*+-./0123456789:;<=>?@ABDEFGHIJKLMNOQRSTUWXYZ[\\]^_`abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz{|}~\u007f".
